## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ZodiacLeo;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ZodiacLeo { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
lion, crown, leadership, fire, confidence, astrology, star sign, horoscope, constellation, celestial
